_comment: Layer 1 of Reward-Hacking Defense System (ADR-0012). Maps commit-message prefixes to required/forbidden diff path scopes. Enforced by the Go gate `evolve commit-prefix-gate` (internal/commitprefixgate), invoked inside `evolve ship` (rc=2 on mismatch; --bypass-prefix-gate is the emergency escape). Paths were repointed from the deleted legacy/scripts + root acs/ tree to the Go tree on 2026-06-23 (ADR-0062 / T1.2) — the script→Go migration had left every scope dead, making the scoped feat()/fix() prefixes un-shippable.

docs.description: Documentation only — diff must be entirely under doc paths. Root-level .md files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, README.md) are listed explicitly because the **/*.md glob requires a directory segment and does not match repo-root files.

feat(guards).description: Kernel guards (internal/guards + cli/guardcmd), the commit/ship gates, their ship-path integration, the prefix manifest, and ACS regression predicates

feat(routing).description: Adaptive model/CLI routing changes (router + llmroute + resolvellm + profiles)

feat(token-opt).description: Token/context optimization (system-prompt assembly, model catalog, profiles). Must touch at least one required_path AND must not be ENTIRELY under forbidden_only_paths

feat(audit).description: Audit-layer changes (EGPS suite, red-team checks, eval gate, auditor persona)

feat(falsification).description: Hypothesis-falsification carryover (Layer 2): carryover/lesson state now lives in cyclestate + faillearn

fix.description: Generic bugfix — gate is permissive (Layer 4 audit-constitution still applies)

_unknown_prefix_behavior: pass-through (rc=0). Unknown prefixes are not blocked — operators can add new prefix types to this manifest as needed. Layer 4's audit-constitution still applies regardless.
